hintText: When making the claim, {{claimantName}} had to say the date they gave you notice (the date of service). If you’re not sure of the exact date, you can find it on the notice.
listItem1: They served you with a notice seeking possession on {{noticeDate}}
viewNoticeLinkText: View a copy of the notice (opens in a new tab)

methodOfService.PERSONALLY_HANDED: the notice was served by personally handing it to or leaving it with {{name}}
methodOfService.PERSONALLY_HANDED_ALT: the notice was served by personally handing it to or leaving it with someone
methodOfService.EMAIL: the notice was served by email to {{emailAddress}}
methodOfService.EMAIL_ALT: the notice was served by email
methodOfService.DELIVERED_PERMITTED_PLACE: the notice was served by delivering it to or leaving it at a permitted place on {{date}}
methodOfService.DELIVERED_PERMITTED_PLACE_ALT: the notice was served by delivering it to or leaving it at a permitted place
methodOfService.FIRST_CLASS_POST: the notice was served by first class post or other service which provides for delivery on the next working day
methodOfService.OTHER_ELECTRONIC: the notice was served by other electronic method: {{details}}
methodOfService.OTHER_ELECTRONIC_ALT: the notice was served by other electronic method
methodOfService.OTHER: the notice was served by other means: {{details}}
methodOfService.OTHER_ALT: the notice was served by other means

question: When did you receive notice from {{claimantName}} (optional)?

date.notRealDate: The date you received notice must be a real date
date.futureDate: The date you received notice must either be today’s date or in the past
date.invalidValue: The date you received notice must be a real date
date.missingOne: The date you received notice must include a {{missingField}}
date.missingTwo: The date you received notice must include a {{first}} and {{second}}
